NCT02623699.label: Outcome
NCT02623699.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT02623699.text: RESULTS: A total of 72 participants received tofersen (39 predicted to have faster progression), and 36 received placebo (21 predicted to have faster progression).

NCT00330681.label: Outcome
NCT00330681.text: Patients meeting all criteria were then randomly assigned 1:1 to receive 60 mg intravenous edaravone or intravenous saline placebo for 6 cycles (4 weeks per cycle with 2 weeks on, 2 weeks off) for a total treatment duration of 24 weeks.
